summary: P12/P14 Contract Testing Complete - Request Stock form correctly implements no-SourceSelector contract. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All 13 frontend features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: RequestStockForm.jsx correctly REMOVED SourceSelector per P12/P14 contract - requester no longer owns batch/segment selection
source_selector is correctly OMITTED from request payload - sender allocates at dispatch via auto-FEFO
available_display_qty is correctly shown as informational only - does NOT block submit when 0
DirectDispatchForm.jsx correctly PRESERVES SourceSelector for own-store segment selection (regression check passed)
Submit button correctly enabled when item+quantity selected (no selector required)
seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: P12/P14 contract fully implemented and tested. Key changes from iteration 13: SourceSelector REMOVED from RequestStockForm (was present before). Now requester only selects source store + SKU + quantity. Sender (central) allocates batch/segment at dispatch via auto-FEFO. Transfer 96 created during testing proves full lifecycle works.

backend_api_tests.test_01_request_sources_returns_sources: PASS - Returns sources with can_submit_request and relation
backend_api_tests.test_03_request_without_source_selector_: PASS - P12 contract: request without selector creates transfer
backend_api_tests.test_04_request_with_source_selector_bac: PASS - Backward compat: request with selector still accepted
backend_api_tests.test_05_approve_no_selector_request_succ: PASS - Approve on no-selector request works
backend_api_tests.test_06_dispatch_auto_fefo_on_no_selecto: PASS - P14 contract: dispatch with {} uses auto-FEFO
backend_api_tests.test_pending_queues_loads: PASS - Regression: pending queues endpoint works
backend_api_tests.test_transfer_history_loads: PASS - Regression: transfer history endpoint works
backend_api_tests.test_hierarchy_summary_loads: PASS - Regression: hierarchy summary endpoint works

frontend_ui_tests.3_source_picker_shows_sources: PASS - Shows 3 sources with relation labels
frontend_ui_tests.4_relation_labels_correct: PASS - Direct Parent, Upstream Central, Sibling labels shown
frontend_ui_tests.5_catalog_items_load: PASS - 4 items load from selected source
frontend_ui_tests.7_no_selector_after_item_selection: PASS - SourceSelector does NOT appear after item selection
frontend_ui_tests.8_submit_enabled_without_selector: PASS - Submit button enabled with item+quantity only
frontend_ui_tests.12_pending_queues_loads: PASS - Regression: Pending Queues page loads
frontend_ui_tests.13_history_ledger_loads: PASS - Regression: History & Ledger page loads

api_contracts_verified.POST /api/proxy/v2/inventory-transfer/re: Returns sources[] with can_submit_request and relation
Returns items[] with source_inventory_master_id and available_display_qty

key_contract_changes_verified.P12_contract: source_selector is OPTIONAL on request - requester no longer owns batch/segment selection
key_contract_changes_verified.P14_contract: dispatch without stored selector uses auto-FEFO allocation
key_contract_changes_verified.selector_ownership: Requester owns: source store, SKU, quantity. Sender owns: batch/segment allocation at dispatch
